TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_u_liwan_sa_tatengaay_a_cabay, title = u_liwan_sa_tatengaay_a_cabay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/u_liwan_sa_tatengaay_a_cabay} }

S.FORM: u liwan sa tatengaay a cabay.Áïô‰∏ãÁöÑÊòØÁúüÊúãÂèã nadikudan nu tuki , u liwan sa tatengaay a cabay. , nikaydaan sa , idaw ku cay kapawan , tanguul kiyami. . pakataealen ku duma nayi ku cacanan. . hatiniay tu atademaw , mahida nisepian hatidayu ku paini nu nababalaki .amana kahica hatini kunikaudip, taneng tu kasaetim tu paini nu babalaki ,hidanamin ku balucu' kiya tatengaay abalucu' tademaw tu tademaw , idaw aca ku likeluh balucu' tu balucu', idaw aca ku kasasukapah. . nikasasukaydih nayi ku mihca, widasa u balucu' masasulalid, cacya kubalucu, mabulah, nayay ku laad, nika alac nu bayu' mamuni' ku baetu. . Saka baluduhan sa, yu udadan maladay muculil, pasasuini tu balucu' masasuhelup tu adungu. Yadahay a masasu paini, cay pakasinum tu balicu' isu, tanayu'ay a nihalhal, cay pakahalhal tu dadatengan a tademaw. . Pakadateng tu kaydih, u nikaudipan a wayway; ukaydih cay kaw laway musakam acacay, maydih tu cacay a tatademawan, caykaw kinacacay a makakitin. , hayni ka udipan a makakitin, balucu' tu balucu'; kiya idaw ku balucu' pakadiheku tu balucu' kiya sibalucu' maduduc. . Sukaydih idaw ku cueded' akutii', upaini nu paudipay malaliwasak tu, masasudiheku kiya matenes , u kaydih idaw ku maibuk atu abesa, balucu' idaw ku pacebaay, masasu paini kiya idaw ku diheku. .
S.PHON: u r~…æiwan sa tat…ô≈ãaaj a ¶abaj.******* nadikudan nu tuki , u r~…æiwan sa tat…ô≈ãaaj a ¶abaj. , nikajdaan sa , idaw ku ¶aj kapawan , ta≈ãuur~…æ kijami. . pakata…ôar~…æ…ôn ku duma naji ku ¶a ¶anan. . ƒßatiniaj tu atad…ômaw , maƒßida nis…ôpian ƒßatidaju ku paini nu nababar~…æaki .amana kaƒßi ¶a ƒßatini kunikaudip, tan…ô≈ã tu kasa…ôtim tu paini nu babar~…æaki ,ƒßidanamin ku bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° kija tat…ô≈ãaaj abar~…æu ¶u î~ ° tad…ômaw tu tad…ômaw , idaw a ¶a ku r~…æik…ôr~…æuƒß bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° tu bar~…æu ¶u î~ °, idaw a ¶a ku kasasukapaƒß. . nikasasukajdiƒß naji ku miƒß ¶a, widasa u bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° masasur~…æar~…æid, ¶a ¶ja kubar~…æu ¶u, mabur~…æaƒß, najaj ku r~…æaad, nika ar~…æa ¶ nu baju î~ ° mamuni î~ ° ku ba…ôtu. . saka bar~…æuduƒßan sa, ju udadan mar~…æadaj mu ¶ur~…æir~…æ, pasasuini tu bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° masasuƒß…ôr~…æup tu adu≈ãu. jadaƒßaj a masasu paini, ¶aj pakasinum tu bar~…æi ¶u î~ ° isu, tanaju î~ °aj a niƒßar~…æƒßar~…æ, ¶aj pakaƒßar~…æƒßar~…æ tu dadat…ô≈ãan a tad…ômaw. . pakadat…ô≈ã tu kajdiƒß, u nikaudipan a wajwaj; ukajdiƒß ¶aj kaw r~…æawaj musakam a ¶a ¶aj, majdiƒß tu ¶a ¶aj a tatad…ômawan, ¶ajkaw kina ¶a ¶aj a makakitin. , ƒßajni ka udipan a makakitin, bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° tu bar~…æu ¶u î~ °; kija idaw ku bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° pakadiƒß…ôku tu bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° kija sibar~…æu ¶u î~ ° madudu ¶. . sukajdiƒß idaw ku ¶u…ôd…ôd î~ ° akutii î~ °, upaini nu paudipaj mar~…æar~…æiwasak tu, masasudiƒß…ôku kija mat…ôn…ôs , u kajdiƒß idaw ku maibuk atu ab…ôsa, bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° idaw ku pa ¶…ôbaaj, masasu paini kija idaw ku diƒß…ôku. .
S.FORM: u liwan sa tatengaay a cabay.Áïô‰∏ãÁöÑÊòØÁúüÊúãÂèã nadikudan nu tuki , u liwan sa tatengaay a cabay. , nikaydaan sa , idaw ku cay kapawan , tanguul kiyami. . pakataealen ku duma nayi ku cacanan. . hatiniay tu atademaw , mahida nisepian hatidayu ku paini nu nababalaki .amana kahica hatini kunikaudip, taneng tu kasaetim tu paini nu babalaki ,hidanamin ku balucu' kiya tatengaay abalucu' tademaw tu tademaw , idaw aca ku likeluh balucu' tu balucu', idaw aca ku kasasukapah. . nikasasukaydih nayi ku mihca, widasa u balucu' masasulalid, cacya kubalucu, mabulah, nayay ku laad, nika alac nu bayu' mamuni' ku baetu. . Saka baluduhan sa, yu udadan maladay muculil, pasasuini tu balucu' masasuhelup tu adungu. Yadahay a masasu paini, cay pakasinum tu balicu' isu, tanayu'ay a nihalhal, cay pakahalhal tu dadatengan a tademaw. . Pakadateng tu kaydih, u nikaudipan a wayway; ukaydih cay kaw laway musakam acacay, maydih tu cacay a tatademawan, caykaw kinacacay a makakitin. , hayni ka udipan a makakitin, balucu' tu balucu'; kiya idaw ku balucu' pakadiheku tu balucu' kiya sibalucu' maduduc. . Sukaydih idaw ku cueded' akutii', upaini nu paudipay malaliwasak tu, masasudiheku kiya matenes , u kaydih idaw ku maibuk atu abesa, balucu' idaw ku pacebaay, masasu paini kiya idaw ku diheku. .
